directive_events.owner_directive: Owner approved merging latest main into desktop before implementing the local package installer.
directive_events.reason: Owner-directed branch sync brings current origin/main governance, workflow, core, frontend, package, and test surfaces into the desktop branch before local package installer work.

owner_directive: Owner directed: merge latest main into the desktop branch, then implement a GUI local package installer where users select a local package file/path; local installer scope overrides conflicting ADR-037 marketplace language.
